name: Ananya Reddy
summary: Personalized 12-step study plan targeting 3 weak areas with progressive difficulty.

steps.description: Theory explanation and conceptual understanding for a topic
steps.reasoning: Organic Chemistry has very low average marks (3.83). Start with conceptual understanding before attempting problems.
steps.message_to_student: Let's begin by strengthening your fundamentals in Organic Chemistry. We'll go through the key concepts and theory so you have a solid foundation before practice.

steps.description: Formula revision sheet for specified chapters

steps.message_to_student: Time to review the important formulas for Organic Chemistry. Having these at your fingertips will help you solve problems faster.

steps.description: Targeted practice set for specific topics, no timer
steps.reasoning: Start with easier problems in Organic Chemistry to build confidence. No timer to reduce pressure.
steps.message_to_student: Now let's practice Organic Chemistry with some problems. Take your time — there's no timer. Focus on understanding each solution.

steps.description: Full timed mock test simulating exam conditions

steps.message_to_student: Time to test yourself! This timed mock will show how much you've improved on your weak areas. Treat it like a real exam.

steps.reasoning: Attempt rate is 82.9% — too many questions are being skipped. Option elimination practice will help attempt more questions confidently.

steps.reasoning: End with a confidence-building speed race in Heat Transfer — a strong area — to maintain motivation.
